packages.name: @cofob/design-system-css
packages.label: CSS and vanilla
packages.description: Semantic CSS, browser-safe theme utilities, and framework-independent interaction controllers.

entrypoints.summary: All controllers, theme helpers, and shared types.
Shared model and primitive types without runtime exports.
Compiled full stylesheet: tokens, fonts, base, and components.
Semantic tokens and light, dark, and system theme values.
Baseline document, focus, motion, and forced-colors rules.
Authoring entry with imports for a consumer PostCSS pipeline.
Explicit-file alias of the PostCSS authoring entry.

groups.title: Initialization
groups.description: Initialize every matching controller below a document, element, or shadow root in one pass.

items.name: initDesignSystem
items.summary: Initializes theme, interaction controllers, and theme toggles and returns one cleanup handle.

items.name: DesignSystemController
items.signature: interface DesignSystemController extends Controller { theme: ThemeController }
items.summary: Combined controller returned by initDesignSystem.

groups.title: Theme runtime
groups.description: Resolve, apply, persist, and bootstrap the light, dark, or system preference without import-time browser access.

items.name: THEME_STORAGE_KEY
items.summary: Default localStorage key used by every theme implementation.

items.name: resolveThemePreference
items.summary: Purely resolves a preference against the system dark-mode state.

items.name: applyThemePreference
items.summary: Writes resolved data attributes and color-scheme to an HTML root.

items.name: createThemeController
items.summary: Creates a persistent theme controller and subscribes to system preference changes.

items.name: getThemeScript
items.summary: Returns the synchronous anti-flash script for server-rendered head markup.

items.name: ThemeStorage
items.summary: Minimal storage contract accepted by the theme controller.

items.name: ThemeControllerOptions
items.summary: Root, initial preference, storage, and storage-key options.

items.name: ThemeController
items.summary: Reads, updates, subscribes to, and cleans up theme state.

groups.title: Dialog and popover controllers
groups.description: Imperative overlay primitives with synchronized state, focus return, Escape, and light-dismiss behavior.

items.name: createDialogController
items.summary: Enhances a modal dialog and its triggers while retaining native dialog behavior.

items.name: DialogController
items.summary: Open, close, toggle, inspect, and destroy operations for a dialog.

items.name: DialogControllerOptions
items.summary: Trigger, backdrop, initial-open, and change callback options.

items.name: createPopoverController
items.summary: Enhances a Popover API element and supplies a data-state fallback for older browsers.

items.name: PopoverController
items.summary: Open, close, toggle, inspect, and destroy operations for a popover.

items.name: PopoverControllerOptions
items.summary: Trigger, placement, dismissal, focus-return, initial-open, and callback options.

groups.title: Menu and selection controllers
groups.description: Keyboard-complete controllers for menus, tabs, and details-based accordions.

items.name: createMenuController
items.summary: Adds popover state, roving focus, arrows, Home, End, typeahead, and focus return to a menu.

items.name: MenuController
items.summary: Open with first or last focus, close, toggle, inspect, and destroy a menu.

items.name: MenuControllerOptions
items.summary: Trigger, initial-open, and open-state callback options.

items.name: createNavbarController
items.summary: Enhances a responsive details-based Navbar with synchronized state, dismissal, and breakpoint reset.

items.name: NavbarController
items.summary: Open, close, toggle, inspect, and destroy operations for a responsive Navbar.

items.name: NavbarControllerOptions
items.summary: Initial state, dismissal behavior, navigation closing, and open-state callback options.

items.name: NavbarCollapseAt
items.summary: Responsive breakpoint mode for collapsing Navbar navigation.

items.name: NavbarMenuVariant
items.summary: Floating card or edge-aligned presentation for collapsed navigation.

items.name: NavbarSurface
items.summary: Solid or backdrop-blurred surface for collapsed navigation.

items.name: createTabsController
items.summary: Connects tabs to panels with ARIA, orientation-aware keyboard movement, and manual or automatic activation.

items.name: TabsController
items.summary: Reads, changes, focuses, and cleans up the selected tab value.

items.name: TabsControllerOptions
items.summary: Controlled/default value, orientation, activation, and change callback options.

items.name: createAccordionController
items.summary: Coordinates details elements, single or multiple expansion, and summary keyboard navigation.

items.name: AccordionController
items.summary: Reads, updates, and cleans up expanded accordion values.

items.name: AccordionControllerOptions
items.summary: Multiple-expansion and value-change callback options.

items.name: createComboboxController
items.summary: Adds filtering, selection, active-descendant state, and keyboard navigation to a combobox listbox.

items.name: ComboboxController
items.summary: Open, close, select, inspect, and destroy operations for a native combobox.

items.name: ComboboxControllerOptions
items.summary: Focus-opening and value-change callback options for a native combobox.

items.name: createAudioPlayerController
items.summary: Connects playback, seek, time, mute, and volume controls to a native audio element.

items.name: AudioPlayerController
items.summary: Playback, seek, volume, mute, and lifecycle operations for an audio player.

items.name: AudioPlayerControllerOptions
items.summary: Known duration fallback used until audio metadata becomes available.

items.name: createVideoPlayerController
items.summary: Connects themed playback, seek, time, mute, volume, and fullscreen controls to a native video element.

items.name: VideoPlayerController
items.summary: Playback, seek, volume, mute, fullscreen, and lifecycle operations for a video player.

items.name: VideoPlayerControllerOptions
items.summary: Known duration fallback used until video metadata becomes available.

groups.title: Tooltip and toast controllers
groups.description: Supplementary descriptions and live-region notifications with explicit lifecycle cleanup.

items.name: createTooltipController
items.summary: Connects triggers through aria-describedby and coordinates hover, focus, delay, and Escape.

items.name: TooltipController
items.summary: Show, hide, inspect, and destroy operations for a tooltip.

items.name: TooltipControllerOptions
items.summary: Trigger and display-delay options.

items.name: TooltipPlacement
items.signature: type TooltipPlacement = top | right | bottom | left
items.summary: Preferred side used when positioning a tooltip beside its trigger.

items.name: createToastController
items.summary: Creates and manages accessible notification DOM inside a viewport.

items.name: ToastController
items.summary: Creates, dismisses, clears, and destroys vanilla toasts.

groups.title: Clipboard controller
groups.description: Framework-independent clipboard behavior for code and terminal command controls.

items.name: copyText
items.summary: Copies text through the Clipboard API without import-time browser access.

items.name: createCopyController
items.summary: Enhances delegated native copy buttons and restores their feedback state after a delay.

items.name: CopyControllerOptions
items.summary: Copy feedback duration and injectable clipboard writer.

items.name: CopyController
items.signature: interface CopyController extends Controller { copy(value): Promise<boolean> }
items.summary: Copies text programmatically and removes delegated listeners on destroy.

groups.title: Shared contracts
groups.description: Portable primitives and content models reused by native, React, and Svelte implementations.

items.name: Size
items.summary: Shared component size scale.

items.name: Tone
items.signature: type Tone = neutral | accent | info | success | warning | danger
items.summary: Semantic visual and feedback tone scale.

items.name: CaptchaState
items.signature: type CaptchaState = idle | verifying | success | error
items.summary: Controlled visual state for the presentation-only Captcha surface.

items.name: CaptchaLabels
items.signature: interface CaptchaLabels { idle; verifying; success; error }
items.summary: Localized copy for every Captcha visual state.

items.name: TerminalCodeEntry
items.signature: interface TerminalCodeEntry { command: string; output?: string }
items.summary: Portable terminal command and optional captured output.

items.name: BashTokenKind
items.signature: type BashTokenKind = plain | command | option | string | variable | operator | comment | number
items.summary: Semantic token categories used to color Bash command text.

items.name: BashToken
items.signature: interface BashToken { kind: BashTokenKind; value: string }
items.summary: An exact source segment emitted by the Bash presentation tokenizer.

items.name: tokenizeBashCommand
items.summary: Classifies Bash command text for syntax presentation without changing its content.

items.name: CAPTCHA_LABELS
items.summary: Default English copy shared by the native and framework Captcha examples.

items.name: ThemePreference
items.summary: Persisted user-facing theme preference.

items.name: ResolvedTheme
items.summary: Theme after resolving system preference.

items.name: ThemeState
items.summary: Snapshot emitted by the theme controller.

items.name: LinkModel
items.summary: Portable link label, URL, external, and current-page state.

items.name: ResponsiveImageModel
items.summary: Portable responsive image source and intrinsic dimensions.

items.name: AnimatedStickerModel
items.signature: type AnimatedStickerModel = { src; width; height } & ({ skeletonSvg } | { firstFrameSrc })
items.summary: Converted animation URL, intrinsic dimensions, and an inline SVG or WebP first frame.

items.name: PostModel
items.summary: Portable post-card content model with display and machine-readable published/updated dates.

items.name: ChatMessageModel
items.summary: Portable chat message content model with body/text fallback and optional safe links.

items.name: ChatModel
items.summary: Portable chat thread model.

items.name: Controller
items.summary: Common cleanup contract for every vanilla controller.

items.name: AnimatedStickerState
items.signature: type AnimatedStickerState = loading | playing | paused | static | disabled | reduced-motion | fallback
items.summary: Playback and inline-fallback states reflected on the animated sticker root.

items.name: AnimatedStickerController
items.summary: Cleanup contract for animated sticker playback and motion-preference listeners.

items.name: AnimatedStickerToggleController
items.summary: Cleanup contract for a native switch bound to the global animated sticker flag.

items.name: AnimatedStickersEnabledListener
items.summary: Subscriber notified whenever the global animated sticker flag changes.

items.name: ANIMATED_STICKERS_ATTRIBUTE
items.summary: HTML attribute used as the document-wide animation opt-out flag.

items.name: ANIMATED_STICKERS_STORAGE_KEY
items.summary: localStorage key used to preserve the global animated sticker preference across reloads.

items.name: createAnimatedStickerController
items.summary: Lazily assigns WebM in the viewport, pauses it outside, removes SVG after playing, and restores SVG for global or motion fallbacks.

items.name: createAnimatedStickerToggleController
items.summary: Connects a native checkbox switch to the document-wide animated sticker flag.

items.name: getAnimatedStickersEnabled
items.summary: Restores and reads whether animated WebM stickers are globally enabled; missing storage and markup default to true.

items.name: setAnimatedStickersEnabled
items.signature: setAnimatedStickersEnabled(enabled: boolean, root?: HTMLElement | null): void
items.summary: Persists the preference and updates the global HTML flag, mounted stickers, and controls.

items.name: subscribeAnimatedStickersEnabled
items.summary: Observes API updates and direct mutations of the global HTML flag.

items.name: DesignSystemRoot
items.summary: Supported initialization boundary.

items.name: ToastAction
items.summary: Portable action attached to a vanilla or React toast.

items.name: ToastInput
items.summary: Portable notification title, description, tone, duration, ID, and action.

packages.name: @cofob/design-system-react
packages.label: React
packages.description: React 18.3 and 19 adapters with separate server-safe and client entrypoints.

entrypoints.summary: Convenience entrypoint containing static and client components, helpers, and types.
SSR and RSC-friendly static components; no use client directive.
Interactive components and hooks with an intentional use client boundary.
Portable models and React composition types.

groups.title: Client helpers
groups.description: Hooks and imperative notifications live behind the client boundary and require the corresponding provider where noted.

items.name: useTheme
items.summary: Reads the nearest ThemeProvider preference, resolved theme, and setter.

items.name: toast
items.summary: Queues a notification for the active ToastProvider and returns its ID.

items.name: useToast
items.summary: Returns provider-scoped methods to create or dismiss notifications.

groups.title: Portable and composition types
groups.description: Import these contracts from the root or the type-only entrypoint. React-specific models replace portable text fields with ReactNode where composition is expected.

items.name: ThemePreference
items.summary: Persisted user theme preference, re-exported from the CSS package.

items.name: ResolvedTheme
items.summary: Resolved theme, re-exported from the CSS package.

items.name: Size
items.summary: Shared component size scale.

items.name: Tone
items.signature: type Tone = neutral | accent | info | success | warning | danger
items.summary: Shared semantic tone scale.

items.name: CaptchaState
items.signature: type CaptchaState = idle | verifying | success | error
items.summary: Controlled visual state re-exported from the CSS package.

items.name: CaptchaLabels
items.summary: Localized copy for each Captcha state.

items.name: TerminalCodeEntry
items.summary: Portable terminal command and output entry.

items.name: ButtonVariant
items.signature: type ButtonVariant = primary | secondary | ghost | danger
items.summary: Visual variants accepted by Button and IconButton.

items.name: SurfaceVariant
items.signature: type SurfaceVariant = default | elevated | outlined | interactive
items.summary: Card surface variants; legacy plain, raised, and muted aliases are deprecated.

items.name: LucideIcon
items.summary: React icon component shape used by optional icon props.

items.name: LinkModel
items.summary: Portable navigation link model.

items.name: LinkItem
items.summary: React-facing alias for the portable link model.

items.name: ResponsiveImageModel
items.summary: Portable responsive image model.

items.name: AnimatedStickerModel
items.summary: React-facing alias for a converted animated sticker with an inline SVG or WebP first frame.

items.name: ImageSource
items.summary: React-facing alias for a responsive image source.

items.name: PostModel
items.summary: Portable post-card content model with display and machine-readable published/updated dates.

items.name: PostSummary
items.summary: React-facing alias for portable post summaries.

items.name: ChatMessageModel
items.summary: Portable chat message model with body/text fallback and optional safe links.

items.name: ChatModel
items.summary: Portable chat thread model.

items.name: ChatMessage
items.summary: React chat message with a ReactNode body for idiomatic composition.

items.name: MenuItem
items.summary: Dropdown menu item label, target, and state.

items.name: TabItem
items.summary: Base tab identifier, label, and disabled state.

items.name: AccordionItem
items.summary: Base accordion identifier, heading, and disabled state.

items.name: PaginationItem
items.summary: Page number, optional URL, and accessible label.

items.name: FooterGroup
items.summary: Footer section title and its portable links.

items.name: IconContent
items.summary: Accepts either a Lucide component or arbitrary React icon node.

items.name: ToastInput
items.summary: React notification input with a ReactNode description.

items.name: ToastRecord
items.summary: Normalized notification record stored by ToastProvider.

groups.title: Static component prop types
groups.description: These prop contracts are exported from the root and static entrypoints; the linked component pages describe their visual states and live behavior.

items.name: ThemeScriptProps
items.summary: Storage key and CSP nonce for ThemeScript.

items.name: SkipLinkProps
items.summary: Native anchor props plus the default main-content target.

items.name: HeadingProps
items.summary: Heading level, display size, and native heading attributes.

items.name: TextProps
items.summary: Polymorphic text element, size, tone, and native attributes.

items.name: LinkProps
items.summary: Anchor attributes and external-link presentation.

items.name: ProseProps
items.summary: Narrow, default, or full prose measure and native article attributes.

items.name: ContainerProps
items.summary: Container width and native div attributes.

items.name: SectionProps
items.summary: Section spacing, semantic surface, and native attributes.

items.name: StackProps
items.summary: Vertical gap and alignment contract.

items.name: InlineProps
items.summary: Horizontal gap, alignment, justification, and wrapping contract.

items.name: ButtonProps
items.summary: Button variant, size, loading state, icons, and native attributes.

items.name: IconButtonProps
items.summary: Accessible icon-only Button contract.

items.name: FieldProps
items.summary: Label, hint, error, required state, and composed field control.

items.name: TextFieldProps
items.summary: Input attributes plus integrated field presentation.

items.name: TextareaProps
items.summary: Textarea attributes plus integrated field presentation.

items.name: SelectProps
items.summary: Select attributes, options, and integrated field presentation.

items.name: CheckboxProps
items.summary: Checkbox label, description, size, error, and native attributes.

items.name: SwitchProps
items.summary: Checkbox-compatible props rendered as a switch.

items.name: CaptchaProps
items.summary: Controlled visual state, labels, and native button attributes without verification logic.

items.name: BadgeProps
items.summary: Badge tone, size, variant, and span attributes.

items.name: TagProps
items.summary: Tag tone, size, optional remove action, and span attributes.

items.name: AlertProps
items.summary: Alert tone, title, icon, actions, and region attributes.

items.name: CardPadding
items.signature: type CardPadding = none | sm | md | lg
items.summary: Card internal spacing scale.

items.name: CardProps
items.summary: Card surface/padding contract as a div or link.

items.name: EmptyStateProps
items.summary: Empty-state title, description, icon, action, and container attributes.

items.name: TableProps
items.summary: Accessible scroll container, caption, density, striping, minimum width, and native table attributes.

items.name: PaginationProps
items.summary: Page items, current value, adjacent labels, and nav attributes.

items.name: BlueLineProps
items.summary: Brand underline animation and rainbow options.

items.name: NavbarProps
items.summary: Brand, links, actions, responsive collapse, menu presentation, state, and native navigation attributes.

items.name: FooterProps
items.summary: Footer brand, grouped links, legal content, and native attributes.

items.name: ResponsiveImageProps
items.summary: Portable source plus loading behavior and native image attributes.

items.name: AvatarProps
items.summary: Responsive avatar source, accessible name or decorative alt, initials fallback, size, loading, and referrer policy.

items.name: InlineEmojiProps
items.summary: Semantic inline image metadata and native image attributes.

items.name: MediaGridProps
items.summary: Semantic list or div container for responsive image, video, and audio media.

items.name: PostCardProps
items.summary: Linked post model, heading level, and anchor attributes.

items.name: LatestPostCardProps
items.summary: Linked latest-post card data, heading level, label, and anchor attributes.

items.name: SearchResultCardProps
items.summary: Linked search result data, highlighting, heading level, and anchor attributes.

items.name: ChatThreadProps
items.summary: React chat messages, accessible label, and list attributes.

items.name: StickerProps
items.summary: Sticker tone, rotation, custom style, and span attributes.

items.name: BreadcrumbItem
items.summary: One hierarchical navigation ancestor or current-page endpoint.

items.name: BreadcrumbsProps
items.summary: Ordered breadcrumb items, accessible label, and navigation attributes.

items.name: RadioProps
items.summary: Native radio attributes plus visible label, description, and size.

items.name: RadioOption
items.signature: interface RadioOption { value; label; description?; disabled? }
items.summary: Portable option record rendered by RadioGroup.

items.name: RadioGroupProps
items.summary: Labelled options, controlled/default value, validation, orientation, and fieldset attributes.

items.name: ProgressProps
items.summary: Determinate or indeterminate value, labels, maximum, and native progress attributes.

items.name: SpinnerProps
items.summary: Accessible status label, size, and span attributes for a loading spinner.

items.name: CircularProgressProps
items.summary: Determinate circular value, maximum, accessible label, size, formatting, and span attributes.

items.name: SkeletonProps
items.summary: Placeholder variant, dimensions, style, and span attributes.

items.name: SeparatorProps
items.summary: Horizontal or vertical orientation, decorative semantics, and native attributes.

items.name: StepperItem
items.signature: interface StepperItem { id; label; description?; href?; disabled?; state? }
items.summary: One complete, current, or upcoming step with optional navigation.

items.name: StepperProps
items.summary: Ordered steps, current ID, orientation, activation callback, and navigation attributes.

groups.title: Client component prop types
groups.description: Interactive prop contracts are exported from the root and client entrypoints.

items.name: AnimatedStickerProps
items.signature: interface AnimatedStickerProps { sticker; alt; playback?; preload? }
items.summary: Converted sticker model, accessible name, auto/static playback mode, video preload hint, and span attributes.

items.name: AnimatedStickerToggleProps
items.signature: interface AnimatedStickerToggleProps { enabled?; defaultEnabled?; label?; description?; onEnabledChange? }
items.summary: Controlled or default global animation state, visible copy, callback, and native input attributes.

items.name: CodeBlockProps
items.summary: Code text, optional language display, copy labels, feedback duration, and div attributes.

items.name: TerminalCodeBlockProps
items.summary: Terminal entries, prompt, per-command copy behavior, output label, and div attributes.

items.name: ThemeProviderProps
items.summary: Controlled or default theme preference, storage key, callback, and children.

items.name: ThemeToggleProps
items.summary: Theme cycle, format callback, size, and button attributes.

items.name: DialogProps
items.summary: Controlled/default open state, trigger, title, actions, and dialog attributes.

items.name: PopoverProps
items.summary: Controlled/default open state, trigger, placement, and popover attributes.

items.name: DropdownMenuProps
items.summary: Menu items, selection callback, trigger, and controlled/default open state.

items.name: ReactTabItem
items.summary: Tab model with ReactNode panel content.

items.name: TabsProps
items.summary: Tab items, controlled/default value, orientation, activation, and callback.

items.name: ReactAccordionItem
items.summary: Accordion model with ReactNode content.

items.name: AccordionProps
items.summary: Accordion items, controlled/default values, multiple mode, and callback.

items.name: TooltipProps
items.summary: Trigger, tooltip content, delay, placement, and wrapper attributes.

items.name: ToastProviderProps
items.summary: Notification limit, default duration, and provider children.

items.name: ToastViewportProps
items.summary: Viewport position, label, and ordered-list attributes.

items.name: ComboboxOption
items.signature: interface ComboboxOption { value; label; description?; disabled? }
items.summary: Filterable listbox option rendered by Combobox.

items.name: ComboboxProps
items.summary: Options, controlled selection/query, accessible copy, callbacks, and root/input attributes.

items.name: DrawerProps
items.summary: Controlled/default open state, edge, trigger, title, actions, and dialog attributes.

items.name: FileUploadProps
items.summary: Controlled files, native filters, count/size limits, drop zone copy, and callbacks.

items.name: SliderProps
items.summary: Controlled/default range value, output formatting, callback, and input attributes.

items.name: AudioPlayerLabels
items.summary: Localized playback, timeline, mute, and volume control labels.

items.name: AudioPlayerProps
items.summary: Audio source, duration fallback, localized labels, disabled state, and media/root attributes.

items.name: VideoPlayerLabels
items.summary: Localized playback, timeline, mute, volume, and fullscreen control labels.

items.name: VideoPlayerProps
items.summary: Video source, caption, aspect ratio, duration fallback, themed controls, media, and figure attributes.

packages.name: @cofob/design-system-svelte
packages.label: Svelte
packages.description: Svelte 5 components, stores, theme helpers, and portable types for SvelteKit or plain Svelte.

entrypoints.summary: All Svelte components, helpers, stores, and public types.

groups.title: Toast store and helpers
groups.description: A framework-native writable store and imperative helpers drive ToastViewport without touching browser globals during module evaluation.

items.name: toasts
items.summary: Readable and writable notification store consumed by ToastViewport.

items.name: toast
items.signature: toast(input: ToastInput): string; toast(message, options?): string
items.summary: Adds or replaces a notification and returns its stable ID.

items.name: dismissToast
items.summary: Dismisses one notification and clears its timer.

items.name: clearToasts
items.summary: Clears every notification and pending dismissal timer.

groups.title: Theme helpers
groups.description: SSR-safe helpers used by the Svelte provider and available for custom integrations.

items.name: resolvedTheme
items.summary: Resolves a preference, returning light during SSR for the system value.

items.name: applyTheme
items.summary: Writes theme preference, resolved theme, and color-scheme to a root in the browser.

groups.title: Portable and composition types
groups.description: Shared contracts mirror the CSS and React adapters while using Svelte snippets for composable content.

items.name: ThemePreference
items.summary: Persisted user theme preference.

items.name: Size
items.summary: Shared component size scale.

items.name: Tone
items.signature: type Tone = neutral | accent | info | success | warning | danger
items.summary: Shared semantic tone scale.

items.name: CaptchaState
items.signature: type CaptchaState = idle | verifying | success | error
items.summary: Controlled visual state re-exported from the CSS package.

items.name: CaptchaLabels
items.summary: Localized copy for each Captcha state.

items.name: TerminalCodeEntry
items.signature: interface TerminalCodeEntry { command: string; output?: string }
items.summary: Portable terminal command and optional captured output.

items.name: ButtonVariant
items.signature: type ButtonVariant = primary | secondary | ghost | danger
items.summary: Visual variants accepted by Button and IconButton.

items.name: LinkModel
items.summary: Portable navigation link model.

items.name: LinkItem
items.summary: Svelte-facing alias for the portable link model.

items.name: ResponsiveImageModel
items.summary: Portable responsive image source model.

items.name: AnimatedStickerModel
items.summary: Svelte-facing alias for a converted animated sticker with an inline SVG or WebP first frame.

items.name: ImageSource
items.summary: Svelte-facing alias for a responsive image source.

items.name: PostModel
items.summary: Portable post-card content model with display and machine-readable published/updated dates.

items.name: PostSummary
items.summary: Svelte-facing alias for a portable post summary.

items.name: ChatMessageModel
items.summary: Portable chat message model with body/text fallback and optional safe links.

items.name: ChatModel
items.summary: Portable chat thread model.

items.name: ChatMessage
items.summary: Svelte chat message with a string or Snippet body.

items.name: MenuItem
items.summary: Dropdown menu item label, target, and state.

items.name: TabItem
items.summary: Tab model with optional string or Snippet content.

items.name: AccordionItem
items.summary: Accordion model with optional string or Snippet content.

items.name: PaginationItem
items.summary: Page number, optional URL, and accessible label.

items.name: SelectOption
items.summary: Select value, label, and disabled state.

items.name: FooterGroup
items.summary: Footer section title and portable links.

items.name: ToastOptions
items.summary: Options for the string overload of toast, including an optional action.

items.name: ToastInput
items.summary: Notification input with a string or Snippet description.

items.name: ToastRecord
items.summary: Normalized notification record stored in toasts.

packages.name: @cofob/design-system-stickers
packages.label: Sticker assets
packages.description: Optimized Telegram sticker media, sharded metadata, and generated React and Svelte components.

entrypoints.summary: Eight lightweight pack descriptors, URL helpers, and shared metadata types. Sticker catalogs and SVG manifests are opt-in subpaths.
Named React components for all stickers; isolated per-sticker subpaths are also available.
Named Svelte components for all stickers; isolated per-sticker subpaths are also available.

groups.title: Catalog and resolution
groups.description: The root stays small; consumers explicitly import one pack catalog, one sticker manifest, or one generated component.

items.name: packs
items.summary: Metadata for the eight attributed packs, including each opt-in catalog path.

items.name: DEFAULT_STICKER_ASSET_BASE
items.summary: Default public base used by generated sticker components.

items.name: resolveStickerAsset
items.summary: Resolves a content-hashed asset path against a consumer's public base URL.

items.name: resolveAnimatedSticker
items.summary: Adapts a full animated manifest to the shared runtime component model.

groups.title: Metadata types
groups.description: Serializable contracts shared by generated modules and pack catalogs.

items.name: StickerPack
items.summary: Attributed pack metadata and the path of its sharded catalog.

items.name: StickerAssetKind
items.summary: Discriminator for static and animated sticker records.

items.name: AnimatedStickerSourceFormat
items.summary: Original Telegram format of an optimized animation.

items.name: StaticStickerAsset
items.summary: Metadata for an optimized transparent WebP sticker.

items.name: AnimatedStickerAsset
items.summary: Full animated metadata with optimized WebM and an inline SVG or WebP first frame.

items.name: VectorAnimatedStickerAsset
items.summary: TGS-derived WebM metadata with a trusted inline SVG first frame.

items.name: VideoAnimatedStickerAsset
items.summary: Video-derived WebM metadata with an optimized content-hashed WebP first frame.

items.name: StickerAsset
items.summary: Union of full static and animated sticker metadata.

items.name: StickerAssetIndexEntry
items.summary: Lightweight catalog record that points to a separate full manifest.

packages.name: @cofob/design-system-assets
packages.label: Build-time assets
packages.description: Node-only conversion of validated Telegram TGS animations into transparent WebM and trusted inline SVG manifests.

entrypoints.summary: TGS conversion API and manifest types. The cf-tgs executable provides the matching CLI.

groups.title: TGS conversion
groups.description: Validate Telegram Lottie constraints, render frame zero, sanitize its SVG, and encode transparent VP9 WebM.

items.name: convertTgs
items.summary: Writes a content-hashed WebM and stable JSON manifest with an inline SVG skeleton.

items.name: ConvertTgsOptions
items.summary: Input, output, public URL, FFmpeg, name, output size, compatibility, and VP9 CRF options.

items.name: TgsConversionManifest
items.summary: Versioned sticker model, media metadata, and SHA-256 hashes for source, WebM, and SVG.

items.name: AnimatedStickerModel
items.signature: interface AnimatedStickerModel { src; skeletonSvg; width; height }
items.summary: Serializable runtime model embedded into SSR output by framework adapters.
